speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Records and rankings
questions: What is the highest mountain in your country?
What is the best restaurant you know?
What was the most difficult exam you ever took?
speaking.sampleAnswer: The highest mountain in my country is Fansipan. The best restaurant I know is near my house. The most difficult exam I ever took was my final English exam.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Similarities and differences
questions: Is your daily routine similar to your friend's?
Is it common for people in your country to work part-time?
Is your hometown as crowded as the capital?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, my routine is quite similar to my friend's. Yes, it's common for students to work part-time. No, my hometown isn't as crowded as the capital.
